blocks.text: Arsenal five clear, City in pursuit — the title race plays tonight
Five points separate Arsenal and City heading into tonight's simultaneous kick-offs. Win at Brighton, the Gunners can build a real buffer. Drop points, and City smell blood.

blocks.label: ⚽ Also tonight — Premier League 20:30
items: Aston Villa vs Chelsea — European spots, Villa Park
Fulham vs West Ham — London derby, Craven Cottage
Newcastle vs Manchester United — European qualification, 21:15

blocks.text: ⚽ Copa del Rey 21:00 — Athletic Club must overturn 1-0 deficit vs Real Sociedad in El Derbi Vasco
